title: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Lumbridge Guide

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I help the Lumbridge Guide?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Well, what better to help the Lumbridge Guide than a 'Cake of Guidance'. Would you like to help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm sure I can make a cake.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds a bit weird though. What does it involve?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Well, I'm not too familiar with the fine details, you'll have to go and speak with Traiborn in the Wizards' Tower. He'll know what you need.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks, I'll get right on it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi, what do I have to do again to help the Lumbridge Guide?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Go have a word with Traiborn in the Wizards' Tower, he should be able to help you out with a Cake of Guidance!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we talk about what happened in the dining room?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Wow! You were incredible! The way you defeated the Culinaromancer, you made it seem so easy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... I don't suppose you can remember how I defeated him can you?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Of course! Which bit can't you remember doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Lumbridge guide... I can't really rememember what I did to save him...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Oh, you told me that that crazy wizard in the wizards' tower helped you with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That crazy wizard at the wizards' tower? Was I not any more specific than that?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: No, not really. I think you might have mentioned the name Traiborn though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah... I remember now...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Did you want a reminder on any other of your brave exploits?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Ello young thingummywut.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi. I was wondering if you could help me?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: You don't look like you have a problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I do. I need to make something called a Cake of Guidance, and I was told that you could help me out.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Mmmmm. Cake of Guidance. Yummy Yum! Did you know they're imbued with knowledge and information itself? When eaten it will give anyone the guidance they need to get back on track. So you say you're a chef?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm. No I don't think I did. I need to make that cake for the Lumbridge Guide. He's been frozen in time and needs help.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Oh dear, it's a strange day when the Lumbridge Guide needs guidance. Don't worry, I shall help you make your chocolate cake.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not a chocolate cake - a CAKE OF GUIDANCE.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Make up your mind!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have. So what do I need to do?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: You don't know? Deary me. You'll need to enchant three ingredients with your own knowledge. Bring me the basic ingredients and I will help you with the enchantment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the ingredients?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: An eggy peggy, some floury woury and some milky wilky.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So to the sane world, an egg, flour and milk. No problem, I'll be right back.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Have a nice time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...Thanks.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Ello young thingummywut.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Brought any ingredients?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I need again?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: I need you to bring me...

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: An egg.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: A pot of flour.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: A bucket of milk.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: I will then enchant them for you so you can make your Chocolate cake!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cake of guidance.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: That's what I said.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you know what you're doing.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Of course. Take care, and don't talk to strangers!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, an egg!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Egg-cellent...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't believe you said that, so I will just pretend you didn't.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Boo. Hiss. You're no fun. I will need your help for the enchantment - you must imbue it with knowledge itself. You must complete a quiz to enact the enchantment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay. Let's start!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Okay. You will be presented with some people that you may have come across on your travels - it's up to you to recall their names. Guess three correctly without error and you will succeed in enchanting the egg.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Name that person!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Correct - and now the second character:

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Name that person!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Correct - and now the third and final character:

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Name that person!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Congratulations!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: That's correct.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That wasn't so bad. Now what?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Well, there is the case of the magic words of enchantment - repeat after me:

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Dandolino Zadribrim!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Dandy lino zadim!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Not quite, but it'll do. I will hold onto the Enchanted Egg for you until you need it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I've enchanted all three ingredients now?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Indeed, best you go bake the cake! You can do it the same way as making an ordinary cake.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Nope, that's not right, you'll have to start again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe later.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Okie dokey, watch out for evil cows.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm, okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got some milk! Can we enchant it?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Mmmm milk. By all means, you're going to have to complete a quiz first to bring forth guidance and enact the enchantment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay. I'm ready!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Okay. You must answer 3 general questions about our lands correctly without getting one wrong. You have as many chances as you need.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Correct! Good job! Two more to go.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Correct! Well done. One more to go.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Correct! Well done. That's all three answered!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: That's correct.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now what?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Repeat after me... Skalindom Ralinaplo.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Skelly domy ralipo!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: ....Close enough. The milk has now been enchanted!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're making this up aren't you?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: How dare you! Now get me the next ingredient! I will hold onto the Enchanted Milk for you until you need it.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: That's not right. You'll have to start again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have obtained a pot of flour!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: So you want to enchant it now? You'll have to take active part by completing a little quiz to imbue the flour with knowledge and enact the enchantment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Quiz me!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: For enchanting this item you will be shown a selection of items, when you stop viewing this selection you'll have to answer three questions correctly in a row and then the flour will be enchanted with guidance.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: That's correct - onto the second set!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Correct - and now the third and final set:

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: That's correct.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And that's it?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: You have to repeat the magic words of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, of course...

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Splendidium romelno!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Spendy dum romeo!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: We shall make a wizard of you yet. I will hold onto the enchanted flour for you until you need it.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Sorry, that's not right. You'll have to start again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe later.}}

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Ello young thingummywut.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What should I be doing now?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Sleeping?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I mean in regards to making the cake.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Ah, bake it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost the egg!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: That's okay, I have another up my sleeve.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Strange place to put it.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost the flour!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Good job I have another to hand then isn't it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost the milk!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: What would you do without me? I can give you another...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

sections.title: Talking to Wizard Traiborn after baking the Cake of Guidance

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Ello young thingummywut.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I made the cake. Just need to go use it now! Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Wah hey! Good work Bill.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's Bill?

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Who knows!?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I made the cake... but I lost it.

lines.speaker: Wizard Traiborn
lines.text: Oopsy daisy! You'll have to make another one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost the [ingredient]!

sections.title: Inspecting the Lumbridge Guide after baking the cake

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have made the cake!

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: What do you want? A prize? Use it on the Lumbridge Guide already!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I made the cake... but I lost it.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Best you go see Traiborn again then and see if he can help you.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Good work adventurer, I've teleported them away to safety! You only have [number] council members left to protect!
